encounters.contact_narrative: Emma is a 59-year-old female working as a manager. They have bachelor level education and good health. They live as: living with parents. They own a car and a bike.
David is a 30-year-old male working as a manager. They have master or above level education and fair health. They live as: living with another family member. They own a car and a bike.
